basics.name: Juntao Zhang
basics.label: Ph.D. Student in Mechanical Engineering
basics.summary: Ph.D. student in Mechanical Engineering at Iowa State University. Research focuses on AI-powered Atomic Force Microscopy, AFM image restoration, smart flattening, deep learning-based defect detection, and digital twin simulation.

education.summary: Direct Ph.D. program; initially admitted as M.S. student. Advisor: Prof. Juan Ren.

work.name: Iowa State University
work.summary: Research in AI-powered AFM image analysis, restoration, and digital twin simulation.
highlights: Developed Smart Flatten algorithm for AFM surface correction.
Built deep learning pipeline for AFM artifact detection and segmentation.
Designed mask-guided inpainting framework for AFM image restoration.
Developed physics-based AFM digital twin simulation for tip-sample interaction modeling.

publications.name: Artifact Removal and Image Restoration in AFM
AFM Imaging Defect Detection and Classification Using Deep Learning
